generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor attached to the Raspberry‑Pi for indoor air‑quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor attached to the Raspberry‑Pi for indoor air‑quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor attached to the Raspberry‑Pi for indoor air‑quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance ParticulateMatterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate‑matter sensor (PM2.5/PM10) attached to the Raspberry‑Pi for indoor air‑quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ParticulateMatterDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor on the laboratory gantry crane measuring carriage location"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor on the laboratory gantry crane measuring carriage speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load sensor on the laboratory gantry crane measuring carried puck weight"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance ParticulateMatterDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ParticulateMatterSensor
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance LoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live temperature measurement stream from the indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzurePipelineEnabler
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live humidity measurement stream from the indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzurePipelineEnabler
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live CO₂ concentration measurement stream from the indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzurePipelineEnabler
]

instance ParticulateMatterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live particulate‑matter (PM2.5/PM10) measurement stream from the indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ParticulateMatterDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzurePipelineEnabler
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane carriage position values logged for each time step"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane carriage velocity values logged for each time step"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance LoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane load (puck weight) values logged for each time step"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data (AutomationML model)
instance IndoorAirflowAutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML model encoding geometry, building layout and air‑flow relationships of the indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutomationMLEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance AzurePipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure pipeline that ingests sensor streams and forwards them to downstream services"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneVisualizationService, CraneValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database used for historical logging of crane telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneHistoricalLoggingService
]

instance AutomationMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AutomationML processing engine that supplies CAD and kinematic information to services"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneCADService, CraneKinematicService
]

instance ControlAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control algorithm package that computes optimal trajectories for the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneTrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance VisualizationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization engine used to render crane motion and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneVisualizationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation engine that compares live measurements against model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance CraneCADService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing a detailed CAD representation of the gantry crane geometry"
    DTDFVocab:provides DetailedGeometryInsight
]

instance CraneKinematicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service computing the crane's pose in real time using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimePoseInsight
]

instance CraneTrajectoryOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal trajectories for puck transport"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputeTrajectoryAction
]

instance CraneHistoricalLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs historical sensor and actuator values to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalTrendInsight
]

instance CraneVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization of crane motion and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionPerformanceInsight
]

instance CraneValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing live measurements against model predictions to detect deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationDetectionInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance DetailedGeometryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivering precise geometric details of the crane for engineering analysis"
]

instance RealTimePoseInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing the current pose (position and orientation) of the crane in real time"
]

instance ComputeTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that calculates an optimal trajectory for a given puck transport task"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical time‑series data to identify trends and anomalies"
]

instance MotionPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing motion paths and performance metrics such as speed and load utilization"
]

instance DeviationDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detecting deviations between measured sensor data and model‑based predictions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, also a Python program, generates motion commands (target positions, velocity set‑points, trajectory identifiers) and sends them to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into the native controller commands of the crane. Commands are transmitted over the same Python‑level connection to the crane controllers, and execution is confirmed indirectly through the state feedback that the Logging Application records."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The exemplars use an ad‑hoc architecture based on containerization and virtualization; virtual‑machine images host the digital‑twin components, which exchange data through an ActiveMQ message broker and persist measurements in an InfluxDB time‑series database. No commercial digital‑twin framework is employed, and the overall system is assembled from open‑source tools."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through the AutomationML representation of the building’s structure and behaviour. The exemplar provides three applications—runtime visualization, simulation and prediction—that compare model outputs with live sensor data, offering mechanisms for ongoing validation of the twin’s accuracy and for detecting discrepancies between the physical system and its digital counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin relies on an MQTT broker for publish/subscribe signalling (standard TCP port 1883). Services such as the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service and the Grafana Dashboard connect to the broker to exchange messages. Persistent data is stored in a TimescaleDB instance accessed via the PostgreSQL protocol over TCP. All components are packaged as containers and run on a shared host network, forming a flat LAN topology within the laboratory environment."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The architecture is deployed on‑premise in the laboratory, using containerised Python services, a TimescaleDB database and a Grafana dashboard. No cloud platform is referenced; the system runs on local hardware (e.g., a workstation or on‑site server). Deployment details such as scalability mechanisms, redundancy, or high‑availability configurations are not described in the provided documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Physical‑world data are collected by a Raspberry‑Pi equipped with sensors and transmitted via the ActiveMQ broker to the twin. The twin model is represented in AutomationML, and the processing pipeline is deployed on Microsoft Azure tools, enabling cloud‑based integration and interoperability with external services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes an AutomationML‑based digital twin, indicating adherence to the AutomationML standard for model representation and exchange; no additional industry standards, certifications, or interoperability frameworks are mentioned in the documents."
]
